title: Ushuaia, Tierra del Fuego — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ushuaia, Tierra del Fuego: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ushuaia is a city in Tierra del Fuego with a population of 82,615. The world’s southernmost city in Tierra del Fuego, with stunning mountains, glaciers, and penguin colonies.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
